steps.title: Identify the cause
steps.content: The passage says Crown Geyser erupts at regular intervals, 10 to 12 hours apart. That regularity is the reason its next eruption can be predicted with some accuracy.

steps.title: Pick a result transition
steps.content: A signals reversal, B signals concession, and C signals addition. The sentence needs a transition that shows predictability follows from regular eruptions. The answer is D.
